_Thank you for contributing to Rose!_

_Please ensure the PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format (e.g. `feat(otel): add feature`)._

## Description

_Summary of the change and which issue is fixed. If the issue doesn't exist, please create one._

Fixes gh-XXXX

## Checklist

- [ ] I have reviewed [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and [development principles](../docs/development-principles.md).
- [ ] I have run a local build and made sure tests pass (`mvn test`; `mvn verify -Pcoverage` matches CI; dev-services ITs need Docker).
